name: afterrealm
description: AfterRealm plugins for Claude Code. Time-aware agents, brutal code roasters, web accessibility auditors, and agent management tools.

plugins.name: father-time
plugins.description: Time-aware agent for Claude Code. Peak hour warnings, session tracking, daily briefings, rate limit forecasting, focus timers, and activity pattern learning.

plugins.name: blunt-cake
plugins.description: Brutal but brilliant code reviewer with the personality of a celebrity chef. 8 modes, 6 personalities, auto-fix, shareable roast cards. Real findings with real jokes.

plugins.name: curb-cut
plugins.description: Professional web accessibility auditor. Scans HTML, JSX, Vue, and Svelte for WCAG 2.2 Level AA violations with plain-English findings and concrete fixes.

plugins.name: level-up
plugins.description: Agent management skill for Claude Code. List, inspect, promote, adapt, and create agents across projects and global scope. Paginated menus, subagent architecture, Template & Adapt for intelligent promotion.

plugins.name: claude-voice
plugins.description: Multilingual voice input for the Claude Desktop App (not the Code CLI). Hold a hotkey, speak any of 99 Whisper languages, transcript pastes into the focused chat. Fills the gap while official voice mode is English-only. Lightweight plugin — no MCP, no TTS. (Windows-tested; macOS/Linux feedback welcome.)
